calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Continued To Sep-26-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-23-2005 Off Calendar

Motion For Terminating Sanctions, Issue Sanctions, Admission Related Sanctions &/Or Evidence Sanctions Or For Order Compelling Responses
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Jaime C. Uziel for Plaintiff Martin Gaehwiler. No other appearaces.
Hearing held. Ruling: Motion for terminating sanctions is granted. Defendant's answer is ordered stricken and his default is entered. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-21-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JAIME C UZIEL FOR PLAINTIFF MARTIN GAEWILER SENIOR, TRUSTEE OF THE GAIHWILER 2000 TRUST
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CHARLES FISHER
(HIS MOTHER DID APPEAR)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.
PLAINTIFF NOTIFIED COURT THAT HIS MOTION WAS GRANTED IN DISCOVERY THIS MORNING, AND
HE WILL BE FILING A DEFAULT JUDGMENT.

COMMISSIONER:SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
